name: Djurslands Bank A/S
summary: Djurslands Bank A/S provides various banking products and services in Denmark. The company offers deposits; car and home loans; pension; payment; investment; insurance; cards; and leasing products, as well as private and net and mobile banking services. It serves private customers, small and medium-sized enterprises, and public institutions. The company was founded in 1965 and is based in Grenaa, Denmark.
